---
title: "Lovisa och William"
# output: html_document
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme:
      # united
      # simplex
      # yeti
      readable
        # primary:
          # "#144836"
    # logo:
      # example.svg
      
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(readxl)
library(crosstalk)
library(leaflet)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
```

Column {data-width=600}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### 
```{r echo=FALSE}
loveData <- readxl::read_xlsx("data_points.xlsx")
loveData$Lattitude <- as.numeric(loveData$Lattitude)
loveData$Longitude <- as.numeric(loveData$Longitude)

scatterCoords <- function(inCoords, newCoords = c()) {
  curCoord <- as.character(inCoords[length(inCoords)])
  outCoords <- inCoords[-length(inCoords)]
  if(as.numeric(curCoord) %in% newCoords) {
    curCoord <- paste0(substr(curCoord, 1, 7), sample(0:9, 1))#, sample(0:9, 1))
  }
  if(length(outCoords) != 0) {
    scatterCoords(inCoords = outCoords, newCoords = c(as.numeric(curCoord), newCoords))
  } else {
    return(c(as.numeric(curCoord), newCoords))
  }
}

loveData$Lattitude <- scatterCoords(loveData$Lattitude)
loveData$Longitude <- scatterCoords(loveData$Longitude)

loveData$key_id <- seq_len(nrow(loveData))

loveData <- crosstalk::SharedData$new(loveData)
# loveData <- crosstalk::SharedData$new(loveData, ~Händelse)

markerSettings <- awesomeIcons(icon = "heart", library = "fa", markerColor = "red", iconColor = "pink")

leaflet::leaflet(loveData, elementId = "myMap") %>%
  leaflet::addTiles() %>%
  leaflet::addAwesomeMarkers(lng = ~ Longitude, lat = ~ Lattitude, label = ~ Händelse, popup = ~ paste0("<b>", Händelse, "</b>: ", Datum), icon = markerSettings)
```

Column {data-width=200}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### 
```{r echo=FALSE}
DT::datatable(data = loveData, extensions = "Select", selection = "none", rownames = FALSE, options = list(pageLength = 100, 
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    select = list(style = 'os', items = 'row'),
    dom = "t",
    columnDefs = list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = c(1, 2, 4)))
  ), elementId = "myTable")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
# Generated code:
# 4. Pure browser JavaScript to handle flyTo mapping and Popups automatically
tags$script(HTML("
  $(document).ready(function() {
    // Wait for the HTML elements to fully initialize in the browser
    setTimeout(function() {
      var table = HTMLWidgets.getInstance(document.getElementById('myTable')).table;
      var map = HTMLWidgets.getInstance(document.getElementById('myMap'));

      // Listen for row click selections inside the Datatable view
      table.on('select', function(e, dt, type, indexes) {
        if (type === 'row') {
          var rowData = table.row(indexes[0]).data();
          
          // Pull target spatial coordinates from the hidden data columns
          // Adjust array mapping positions if columns rearrange
          var lat = parseFloat(rowData[2]); 
          var lng = parseFloat(rowData[3]);
          var title = rowData[0];
          var date = rowData[1];

          if (!isNaN(lat) && !isNaN(lng)) {
            // Smooth pan/zoom down into the target dot coordinate
            map.flyTo([lat, lng], 14);

            // Dynamically inject and snap open an active information popup
            L.popup()
              .setLatLng([lat, lng])
              .setContent('<strong>' + title + '</strong><br>' + date)
              .openOn(map);
          }
        }
      });
    }, 1500); // 1.5-second buffer ensures smooth script asset bindings
  });
"))
```
